content: MIKE CHEN - Data Scientist & ML Engineer EXPERIENCE: - 6 years data science and machine learning experience - Python expert: pandas, numpy, matplotlib, seaborn - Deep Learning: TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch - MLOps: MLflow, Kubeflow, model deployment pipelines - Built fraud detection system reducing losses by 30% - Research background in computer vision and NLP EDUCATION: - Ph.D. Computer Science, Carnegie Mellon (2017) - M.S. Statistics, UC Berkeley (2015) PROJECTS: - Developed real-time fraud detection using ensemble methods - Created customer churn prediction model (92% accuracy) - Built computer vision system for quality control in manufacturing - Published 8 papers on machine learning in top-tier conferences SKILLS: Python, R, ML, Deep Learning, Statistics, Research, MLOps
